name: cashsnap_synthetic_governance_v1
scope: CashSnap WebGL synthetic-data pipeline, trainable-candidate packages, and bounded internal model probes.
public_release_blocker: Banknote cutout source rights, local real review labels, and public reproduction constraints are not release-reviewed. Synthetic packages are internal experiment artifacts until a separate rights/privacy audit approves release.
model_release_blocker: Synthetic additions have not passed protected real fan/overlap/hand transfer gates, clean/base guardrails, rare-class guardrails, and browser count-error guardrails.
intended_uses: Generate auditable internal WebGL trainable-candidate and diagnostic datasets for CashSnap denomination detection/counting probes.
Fill named condition gaps from the target matrix only after real anchors, row-count controls, and model comparison gates are available.
Support visible-region label, fragment-label, OBB-label, count-contract, package-QA, and scorecard audits.
prohibited_uses: Public dataset release, model release, or production deployment claims without a fresh rights/privacy review and a passing synthetic dataset scorecard.
Counterfeit detection, anti-counterfeit authentication, or claims about genuine/fake currency.
Treating blank-label real images as no-note hard negatives before visual verification.
Promoting diagnostic WebGL recipes into trainable mixes without their declared real bridge and controls.
limitations: Current cutout bank is suitable for internal synthetic experiments only until source licensing and currency reproduction constraints are reviewed.
Real fan/overlap/hand stress labels and real mixed USD+KHR rare/common captures are still missing as protected transfer proof.
Synthetic domain-gap passes do not prove model utility; promotion requires real-holdout utility improvement and per-class guardrails.
Fragment labels represent visible evidence components, not physical note counts, and require downstream fusion before count claims.
privacy_controls: Synthetic packages should not include people, faces, private documents, or store/customer identifying details.
Real capture or mined-review artifacts must stay internal until source ownership, consent, split isolation, and privacy review are complete.
Public artifacts must omit private local paths, credentials, account identifiers, and unreviewed real images.
label_policy: Visible-region boxes/masks are authoritative for detect-only probes.
OBB labels are valid only when the visible mask is compact enough that the rotated box does not cover large hidden regions.
Disconnected visible evidence from one physical note remains one physical count target; fragment labels need fusion.
Ambiguous barely visible fragments should be ignore/unknown rather than forced denomination labels.
promotion_requirements: Target condition is mapped in the real target matrix and recipe catalog.
Rendered package passes package QA, label-view QA, appearance diversity, count-contract, and declared diagnostic gates.
A protected real anchor/holdout exists for the condition, including fan/overlap/hand and mixed USD+KHR rare/common stress when relevant.
Synthetic candidate beats matched real-only or row-count/class-exposure controls without material clean/base, rare-class, or browser regressions.
Dataset scorecard passes with --require-pass before any perfect/done or release-ready claim.

source_artifacts.purpose: Required condition inventory, real bridge roles, capture requirements, and blockers.
All synthetic recipe statuses, intended uses, promotion gates, and current blockers.
Active bounded trainable-candidate package set and package paths.
Visual review rules for package acceptance/rejection.
Reviewed/rejected background bank registry and trainable-use policy.
Environment-map registry, source/license requirements, and acceptance state.
External label-empty negative image registry for licensed/reviewed stock or public images of non-target currency and clutter.
Cutout-bank class/side/visual/usage audit for the current internal source assets.
Manual source leads and blocked/rights-review-only external dataset candidates.
Inventory of usable/internal real stress captures for validation bridging.
Real benchmark source provenance and promotion statuses.
Mission-level synthetic dataset scorecard and --require-pass gate.
